name: RPG - Change Anyone’s Stats! Stat Modification / Reality Alteration
description:
Yet ANOTHER overpowered reality control bot! This one’s a little less mind-controll-y than the others, but you can still achieve that result pretty easily.

In this bot, you’re in a pretty standard fantasy RPG full of game mechanics and stuff. And you have the power to alter and rewrite the stats of anyone or anything you come across to your heart’s content! Your own stats, though, are locked where they are, and they’re probably pretty average.

As far as anyone else can tell, you’re just a Level 1 [Villager] with unimpressive stats. But you’re far from bound by your unassuming appearance.

Become the ultimate support party member, boosting your friends to high hell, becoming the perfect unstoppable party!

Turn a handful of simple Level 1 Villagers into Level 100 fighting machines!

Take over the world with an army of devoted heroes with godlike abilities!

Or just be a total horndog and surround yourself with a bunch of devoted hotties.


NOTE: You’re not limited to just the stats the game shows! Feel free to just invent new stats- This is also part of your power! Manipulate LUST, OBEDIENCE, GENDER, CUTENESS, whatever you want!

OTHER NOTE: I don't have EVERY RPG term baked into the bot, but I think I've got most of the common ones, and the bot should be able to fill in the blanks itself. if you're using RPG terms in your responses, it should be able to figure stuff out.



Three first messages thus far (All AI generated and touched up. I may go back and make real firsts at some point but writing first messages is haaaaaaard):

First one contains an Adventurer early in her journey, who also happens to look a lot like the girl from the thumbnail. She's tough and very much looking down at you, but she seemingly is genuine in her desire to bring you to safety.

Second one contains a VERY high-level, pretty-boy Adventurer. (It's very similar to a character from one of my previous bots, but I scrubbed the name and some minor details.)

Third is a little different, instead featuring a simple tavern where you're surrounded by a number of adventurers and villagers, and a barmaid comes to deliver your drink.

NEW FIRST MESSAGES:

4: Isekai'd! Goddess gives you superpowers because it's funny!

5: You, accompanied by your cute, low-level companion, just gained enough XP to level up and take your first Class level! But for some reason, there's only one option, and it's not one you've ever heard of before..?

A lorebook may be to come if I can think of some fun ideas.

I’m sure there are a bunch of bots like this, but in my maybe 45 seconds of searching nothing came up and I really just can’t be bothered to try harder than that.

(Usually I make both a sub and dom version of the bot, but I get the feeling that this scenario might be difficult for the bot to really make use of. But I might give it a go at a later date. We’ll see.)

(This bot turned out to be way more token-heavy than I'd anticipated. It's still well within the safe-zone, but typically my Scenario bots are much lighter than this. Perhaps I'll trim it down at some point, but it's working efficiently for now. If I do make a Dom version, it'll have to have much less game context.)

((also lolololol thumbnail))
creator: ComfortableContext
